elements.title: Palmyrene inscriptions
elements.contents: ... that the first decipherment of a dead language in modern times was of Palmyrene inscriptions (first published example pictured)?

elements.title: a raja of Kolhapur
elements.contents: ... that a raja of Kolhapur was knighted at the age of 14?

elements.title: a lunar eclipse
elements.contents: ... that a lunar eclipse is said to have fulfilled a prophecy resulting in the fall of Constantinople?

elements.title: T. S. Denison
elements.contents: ... that a historian described the publisher T. S. Denison as synonymous with blackface minstrelsy?

elements.title: Phase Three of the Marvel Cinematic Universe
elements.contents: ... that director Peyton Reed likened the collaboration between the filmmakers of Phase Three of the Marvel Cinematic Universe to the studio system of Golden Age Hollywood?

elements.title: Society for Crypto-Judaic Studies
elements.contents: ... that several people returned to Judaism after discovering their Jewish ancestry through the Society for Crypto-Judaic Studies?

elements.title: Angel Cake
elements.contents: ... that Cathy Cassidy wrote Angel Cake after reading a girl's account of her first days in Britain?

elements.title: Aoi Sangoshou
elements.contents: ... that the 1980s J-pop song "Aoi Sangoshou" appeared on music charts in Korea 44 years after its release?

elements.title: Coral Sea Islands
elements.contents: ... that the Coral Sea Islands were once proclaimed to be an independent nation known as the Gay and Lesbian Kingdom of the Coral Sea Islands?
